Description: A sweet-smelling spice made from the dried pod of the rare vanilla plant. It is often used in the making confectionaries as well as medicines.
A sweet-smelling spice made from the dried pod of the rare vanilla plant. It is often used in the making of confectionaries as well as medicines.
A labor-saving white dye, used for coloring anything from cloth to metal.

Once in common use as a single-color dye, this item has since been rendered obsolete by the invention of all-purpose dyes capable of producing a wide range of distinct hues.
Can be exchanged for improved dye items at Calamity Salvager NPCs.

The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this limited edition of *Modern Aesthetics* covers, in detail, techniques on transforming yourself into Scions of the Seventh Dawn Antecedent Minfilia.

Use to unlock a new hairstyle at the aesthetician.
Fits: ♀ (excepting Viera and Hrothgar)

Description:
The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of *Modern Aesthetics* covers, in detail, techniques on becoming the most memorable of all protagonists.

Use to unlock a new hairstyle at the aesthetician.
Unavailable to Viera and Hrothgar.

The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of *Modern Aesthetics* covers, in detail, techniques for trimming and coiffing one's way to the dashing look that's in vogue amongst sellswords across the Three Great Continents.

Unavailable to female Hrothgar.

This sand gathered in central Thanalan is not only fine, but extremely well behaved, choosing to stay in one closely knit lump while jostling alongside the rest of your possessions.

Can be exchanged for improved dye items at Calamity Salvager NPCs.

The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this limited edition of *Modern Aesthetics* covers, in detail, shaping and feathering techniques for imitating the *unique* look of an Ishgardian saint of eld.

Unavailable to female Hrothgar.

Description: Made to float carefree upon the water, this inflatable moogle serves equally well as whimsical garden seating.

Description: Made to float carefree upon the water, this inflatable bomb serves equally well as whimsical garden seating.

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of Black Cat, the claw in the dark.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Bottom Border, Accent
Name: Black Cat Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of Honey B. Lovely, the darling of the Arcadion.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Honey B. Lovely Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of the Brute Bomber, former champion of the Arcadion's light-heavyweight division.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Brute Bomber Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of Wicked Thunder, the witch for a new age.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Pattern, Backing, Top Border, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Wicked Thunder Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of Dancing Green, soul of the party and king of the dance floor.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Dancing Green Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of Sugar Riot, the artistic rebel with a cause.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Sugar Riot Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of the Howling Blade, former apex predator of the Arcadion's cruiserweight division.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Pattern, Backing, Top Border, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Howling Blade Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of Vamp Fatale, the lovely─and lethal─fighter of the Arcadion's heavyweight division.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Vamp Fatale Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of Deep Blue, half of the Arcadion heavyweight division's dynamic surfing duo.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Portrait Frame, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: Deep Blue Framer's Kit

Description:
Tools for enhancing portraits and adventurer plates. Use to unlock embellishments fit for fans of the Tyrant, former grand champion of the Arcadion.
Includes Portrait Elements: Background, Frame, Accent
Includes Plate Elements: Base Plate, Backing, Top Border, Plate Frame, Accent
Name: The Tyrant Framer's Kit

Description: A hand-painted notice advertising the Moonfire Faire of a year gone by, capturing the distinctive sensation of sweat and seawater.
Name: Moonfire Faire MMXXV Advertisement

Description: A conveniently sized notice, ideal for lending a festive air to household surfaces. It suggests the distinctive sensation of sweat and seawater.
Name: Tabletop Moonfire Faire MMXXV Advertisement

Description: A hand-painted notice advertising the Moonfire Faire of a year gone by. The illustration was commissioned and reviewed─in exacting detail─by the faire's preeminent financial backer.
Name: Moonfire Faire MMXVII Advertisement

Singular: Make It Rain Campaign MMXXV advertisement
Plural: Make It Rain Campaign MMXXV advertisements
Description: A hand-painted notice advertising the Make It Rain Campaign of a year gone by, depicting a rousing match of Doman mahjong at the Gold Saucer.
Name: Make It Rain Campaign MMXXV Advertisement

Singular: tabletop Make It Rain Campaign MMXXV advertisement
Plural: tabletop Make It Rain Campaign MMXXV advertisements
Description: A conveniently sized notice, ideal for lending a festive air to household surfaces. Advertising a Make It Rain Campaign gone by, it depicts a rousing match of Doman mahjong at the Gold Saucer.
Name: Tabletop Make It Rain Campaign MMXXV Advertisement

Singular: Make It Rain Campaign MMXXIV advertisement
Plural: Make It Rain Campaign MMXXIV advertisements
Description: A hand-painted notice advertising the Make It Rain Campaign of a year gone by, depicting a costumed imp bathed in the golden glow of MGP.
Name: Make It Rain Campaign MMXXIV Advertisement

Description:
An otter and a gentleman.

Use item to acquire the Senor Otter minion.
Name: Senor Otter

Description: An illustrated manual on how to flamboyantly tumble to the ground and command a crowd's attention during a rousing bout of fisticuffs. Use to learn the /blownaway emote.
Name: Ballroom Etiquette - Indecorous Declines

Singular: copy of *Ballroom Etiquette - Improper Praise (Cheer On: Orange)*
Plural: copies of *Ballroom Etiquette - Improper Praise (Cheer On: Orange)*
Description: An installment in a long-running series of manuals on how to express admiration in a manner unbefitting one of high birth. Perhaps prudently, later editions do not specify the total number of volumes in the series. Use to learn the /cheeronorange emote.
Name: Ballroom Etiquette - Improper Praise (Cheer On: Orange)

Description:
A steaming-hot spiced beverage served in a decorative mug. An authentic pick-me-up for the cold and weary.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
  **Piety Bonus:** +4% (Max 10)
  **VIT Bonus:** +5% (Max 12)
  **Gear Durability Bonus:** +3
  **EXP Bonus:** +3%
  **Duration:** 30m
  (Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Authentic Starlight Kinderpunsch

Description: The best part of drinking kinderpunsch is that after you've had a few, you can stack the mugs to form this authentically festive Starlight decoration.
Name: Authentic Starlight Mug Tower

Description:
A steaming-hot spiced beverage served in a decorative Starlight mug. Notes of authentic Lominsan citrus.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
  **Piety Bonus:** +4% (Max 10)
  **VIT Bonus:** +5% (Max 12)
  **Gear Durability Bonus:** +3
  **EXP Bonus:** +3%
  **Duration:** 30m
  (Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Authentic Lominsan Kinderpunsch

Description: This stack of empty mugs of Lominsan kinderpunsch doubles as an authentically festive Starlight decoration. Keep away from wintertime sea breezes.
Name: Authentic Lominsan Mug Tower

Description:
A steaming-hot spiced beverage served in a decorative Starlight mug. Notes of butter and authentic Ul'dahn spice.

※Cannot be retrieved once used.
※Can be used up to 10 times.

Meal benefits when used:
  **Piety Bonus:** +4% (Max 10)
  **VIT Bonus:** +5% (Max 12)
  **Gear Durability Bonus:** +3
  **EXP Bonus:** +3%
  **Duration:** 30m
  (Duration can be extended to 60m by consuming multiple servings)
Name: Authentic Ul'dahn Kinderpunsch

Description: This stack of empty mugs of Ul'dahn kinderpunsch doubles as an authentically festive Starlight decoration. Ensure mugs have been thoroughly cleaned to remove any residual sabotender pulp before display.
Name: Authentic Ul'dahn Mug Tower
